name: 17p11_2_TRIM16_SD
description: TRIM16/TRIM16L paralog SD — core duplicon module of the SMS-REPs. TRIM16 sits in proximal SMS-REP, TRIM16L in distal SMS-REP; their >98% identity defines the NAHR substrate. Sub-locus of 17p11_2_Smith_Magenis.

architecture.internal_structure: TRIM16 and TRIM16L paralog cassettes of ~30-50 kb each at >98% identity; flanked by ALDH3A1/2 duplicons; core NAHR substrate of SMS-REPs.
